overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow drone-like orbit around a massive decaying head statue in an abandoned urban plaza. The camera circles the monument revealing dystopian skyscrapers, construction cranes, and industrial structures under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned corporate monument plaza with decaying statue

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the monument counter-clockwise to survey the statue and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: massive weathered stone head with glasses and colorful light strings draped across it
wide concrete staircase with graffiti including 'CORPO' text
tall yellow and gray industrial structure with multiple levels
cluster of futuristic glass and steel high-rise buildings under construction
multiple tower cranes silhouetted against the sky
network of cables stretching across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a massive decaying head statue adorned with colorful lights, situated on a graffiti-covered concrete platform. The camera slowly orbits right-to-left, revealing a dystopian cityscape with yellow industrial buildings on the right and construction cranes against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned corporate monument plaza with industrial debris

events.description: camera passes the frontal plane of the statue revealing the left side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing the circular path around the monument to reveal the left side environment

entered.detail: large red geodesic dome or spherical framework structure
scattered wooden pallets and trash on the concrete ground
tufts of grass and vegetation growing through cracks in the pavement

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues circling the monument, the yellow building exits the frame and a large red spherical structure comes into view on the left. The perspective shifts to show the left side of the statue's face while revealing abandoned debris and overgrown weeds scattered across the neglected plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement around a massive decaying head statue, shifting the focus from a bright industrial backdrop to the desolate ruins of an abandoned plaza. It begins by circling the colorful, weathered monument from right to left, revealing a dystopian cityscape dominated by yellow industrial buildings and construction cranes under a clear blue sky. As the camera continues its arc, the yellow structures slide out of view to make room for a large red spherical building appearing on the left. The perspective then shifts to reveal the opposite side of the statue's face, finally expanding the view to show the neglected ground below, where abandoned debris and overgrown weeds scatter across the concrete.
